display.purpose: Hero and one-line section statements only. Big, tight, rare — one per section.

headline.purpose: Section openers and the closing contact line.

title.purpose: Card headings, stat labels, panel titles.

body.purpose: Marketing prose, capped 65–75ch. Cream primary, Mist supporting.

label.purpose: Cinematic credit/timecode chrome. Never a section eyebrow.

shadows.name: emerald-glow
shadows.purpose: Halo under the primary CTA or active media frame so the accent reads as a light source. Max once per viewport.

shadows.name: frame-lift
shadows.purpose: Diffuse separation for a pinned media element or contact panel against the void. Never tight.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for reveals and state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: ease-power3
motion.purpose: GSAP power3-equivalent for orchestrated scroll entrances and the hero word stagger.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on buttons, links, inputs.

motion.name: scrub-smoothing
motion.purpose: ScrollTrigger scrub value — 1s catch-up smoothing on the media stage and horizontal pan.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single brightest interactive element on its screen — primary CTA fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #259E8F; color: #0A0E0D; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 18px 36px; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1B7A6E; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 0 40px -8px rgba(37,158,143,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FDF5D7; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Second-tier action. Transparent with hairline border; inverts to cream fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #FDF5D7; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 18px 36px; border: 1px solid #252B29; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FDF5D7; color: #0A0E0D; border-color: #FDF5D7; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #259E8F; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Editorial underline field — no box, hairline bottom border, emerald on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; color: #FDF5D7; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 16px 0; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #252B29; border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8E9A95; } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom: 2px solid #259E8F; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Raised surface on the void. Used sparingly — the 3 service props, news items. Never nested.
components.html:
01 · PERFORMANCE

Built for speed

Frame-perfect delivery that loads before the eye settles — every asset tuned for the cut.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #121614; color: #FDF5D7; border: 1px solid #252B29; border-radius: 4px; padding: 40px; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { background: #1A201E; } .ds-card-label { display: block; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #259E8F; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Geist Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.75rem; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #8E9A95; margin: 0; max-width: 36ch; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Minimal transparent bar over the hero — cream wordmark, sparse mono links with growing emerald underline.
components.html:
RENJANA
WorkServicesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 24px 40px; background: transparent; } .ds-nav-mark { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Geist Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #FDF5D7; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8E9A95; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: #259E8F; transition: width 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #FDF5D7; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Scroll Caption
components.description: Mono milestone caption overlaid on the scroll-scrubbed media stage; fades in/out at scroll progress.
components.css: .ds-caption { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #FDF5D7; } .ds-caption-num { color: #259E8F; }

narrative.overview: A void-dark editorial canvas where the footage, the frame, and a single emerald signal are the only sources of light. Restraint is the luxury; each section breathes for a full viewport or more, and motion is directed (a few orchestrated GSAP moments) rather than decorative. The page should feel like an Apple keynote shot at night: cinematic, confident, expensive. It rejects corporate stock-agency tropes, generic SaaS/startup scaffolding, and anything cheap or amateur. Warmth lives in the cream type and emerald accent, never in a tinted surface — there is no near-white surface in this system.
keyCharacteristics: Void-dark canvas; the work is the only thing that glows.
Near-monochrome with exactly one sharp accent (emerald).
Generous, cinematic negative space — sections sized in viewports.
Huge confident display type, tight tracking, sparingly used.
Directed motion: few orchestrated scroll moments, never jittery.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Emerald covers ≤10% of any viewport. It is a signal, not a paint. If a section has two emerald elements competing, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The No Near-White Rule
rules.body: There is no light surface in this system. Backgrounds are void/surface dark; warmth is carried by cream type and emerald, never by a cream-tinted background. A beige/sand/parchment panel is an instant tell and is forbidden.

rules.name: The Credit-Line Rule
rules.body: The uppercase mono label is film-credit chrome, not a section eyebrow. Legitimate as a timecode, scroll-milestone caption, or footer credit; forbidden as a tracked kicker stacked above every heading.

rules.name: The Big-and-Rare Rule
rules.body: Display type earns its 120px by being scarce. One display moment per section, maximum.

rules.name: The Lit-From-Within Rule
rules.body: Surfaces don't sit above the canvas, they glow within it. If you reach for a hard drop shadow to fake depth, the answer is more negative space or a step in tone instead.

dos: Do keep the canvas void-dark (#0A0E0D) and let the footage be the only light in the room.
Do ration the emerald — ≤10% of any viewport, signal not paint (The One Signal Rule).
Do size sections in viewports; let each one breathe for a full screen or more.
Do set display type big, tight (-0.03em), and rare — one display moment per section.
Do orchestrate a few directed GSAP moments (pinned hero, scroll-scrubbed stage, one horizontal pan) with power2/power3 easing.
Do ship a clean static fallback for every animation under prefers-reduced-motion, and keep body/placeholder text ≥4.5:1 (WCAG AA).
donts: Don't introduce any near-white / cream / sand / parchment background panel — there is no light surface in this system (The No Near-White Rule).
Don't use purple-gradient-on-white SaaS slop, gradient blobs, gradient text, or glassmorphism-as-default.
Don't stack a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section — the mono label is film-credit chrome, not a kicker (The Credit-Line Rule).
Don't build identical icon-heading-text feature-card grids, hero-metric blocks, or any AI-default landing scaffold.
Don't lean on corporate stock photography, smiling-handshake imagery, or corporate-blue — this is a creative house, not a vendor.
Don't fake depth with hard drop shadows on the dark canvas; use tone and negative space (The Lit-From-Within Rule).
Don't scatter jittery micro-animations or autoplay chaos that buries the work; motion is directed, not ambient.
Don't round corners into pills/rounded-xl — the system is near-sharp and editorial (2–4px).
